projects.name: ScribeSnap.ai
projects.desc: AI-powered EdTech tool that extracts transcripts from YouTube, Vimeo, and uploaded videos — turns them into summaries, flashcards, chapter breakdowns, and study guides. 6,000+ unique users, 50–80 daily actives.

projects.name: SpotGrove
projects.desc: Full-stack web and mobile app for remote workers to discover cafes, libraries, and coworking spaces. AI trust layer powered by Claude moderates every submission and cross-references Google Places before publishing.

projects.name: Genomic Cancer Analysis Agent
projects.desc: Built in 2 hours at the NVIDIA GTC Hackathon. AI clinical genomics assistant for oncologists — upload a genomic report, get evidence-based mutation analysis. NVIDIA Nemotron-70B via NIM API, live PubMed and ClinVar retrieval.

projects.name: CONcoin Crypto Prototype
projects.desc: A fictitious cryptocurrency with a detailed website advertising physical and digital products.

projects.name: AI Chatbot
projects.desc: An intelligent AI-powered chatbot built with Streamlit, featuring natural language processing and conversational capabilities.

projects.name: Flappy Clone
projects.desc: Unity-based game based on Flappy Bird. Available on browser or desktop (Windows, macOS).

projects.name: Ticket System
projects.desc: Ticket reservation service with integrated database, full end-to-end product.

projects.name: Password Generator
projects.desc: A modern, multilingual, client-side password generator that creates strong, secure passwords with customizable options.

projects.name: Calendar in C
projects.desc: A calendar program in C that empowers users to select any year and effortlessly visualizes the corresponding calendar.
